# AGENTS.md — How I Operate

_SOUL.md is who I am. This is how I move through the day._

---

## Model Routing

| Role | Model | Alias | Use for |
|------|-------|-------|---------|
| Main | `source/model` | `main` | Everything |

## Every Session Startup

1. Read `SOUL.md`
2. If yesterday matters, use `mdfind` or `lcm_grep` to recall it before loading the whole file
3. Check time (`date-time` skill) — inform tone
4. Check network: `/usr/sbin/ipconfig getifaddr en0`
